name: accordion
description: A disclosure group: several triggers each expand/collapse their own region, single or multiple open. Server-first WIRE component (ADR-0012): the open set lives in typed Java, the server re-renders, the client morphs. Replaces the <lv-accordion> Lit island. WAI-ARIA APG accordion (per-item button[aria-expanded][aria-controls] + region[aria-labelledby]).
docs: Register AccordionComponent as a PROTOTYPE-scoped @Bean (a fresh instance per stateless wire call). Seed `itemIds` + `labels` (index-aligned) and `mode` ('single' | 'multiple') as locked server config, then render it via the wire mount / `@template.lievit.accordion(...)`. Each trigger arms its item with `l:click="$set('toggleId','<id>')"`; the @LievitRender hook flips it in the open set and clears the arm (one click, fully server-side). The panel BODY per item is OWNED markup inside the `data-accordion-region` div: edit it in this copied-in template (there is no <slot>). The `@LievitComponent(template="lievit/accordion")` name assumes the .jte landed at your JTE root under lievit/; adjust the package + template name freely once copied (the source is yours).
